block_00: Prove your trading skills to get a funded account
block_03: We are excited to have you as our potential SabioTrader! Before we grant you access to a funded account, we’d like you to pass a quick assessment challenge. It will help us evaluate your trading skills and make a decision regarding your onboarding.
block_06: First, log in to your SabioDashboard. This is your main space where you can track your performance, status, assessment objectives, and possible rule breaches.

block_24: Disclaimer: Trading carries a high level of risk, and may not be suitable for everyone. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Before getting involved in trading, you should carefully consider your personal objectives, level of education/experience, and risk appetite. You must be aware that the possibility exists that you could sustain a loss of some or all of your initial deposit and therefore, you should not trade with funds which you cannot afford to lose. The information contained in this email does not constitute financial advice in any form, nor is it a solicitation to buy or sell any Forex contract or securities of any type. We will not accept liability for any loss or damage, including without limitation any loss of profit, which may arise directly or indirectly from use of or reliance on such information.
